politicsNews.author: Davenport
politicsNews.title: US Senate Rejects Resolution to Stop Iran's Military Actions
politicsNews.description: The U.S. Senate voted 47-53 against a war powers resolution.It means that the current military assault in Iran can continue without needing urgent Congress approval.

politicsNews.author: Davenport
politicsNews.title: UK Chancellor Makes 2026 Spring Forecast in Westminster
politicsNews.description: Chancellor Rachel Reeves gives the Spring Forecast, which includes promises to lower inflation, cut national borrowing, and make life easier for people in Britain.

politicsNews.author: Davenport
politicsNews.title: House Prepares for War Powers Vote on Middle East Conflict
politicsNews.description: The House of Representatives is getting ready for a tense vote on a war powers resolution, following the Senate's lead.

secondaryNews.author: Davenport
secondaryNews.title: Vet Lawmakers Rally at US Capitol Against Iran Escalation
secondaryNews.description: A vocal group of Democratic representatives and military veterans gathered outside the Capitol today to push back against the White House's current military strategy.

secondaryNews.author: Davenport
secondaryNews.title: Green Party's Hannah Spencer Officially Enters House of Commons
secondaryNews.description: Newly elected Green MP Hannah Spencer officially takes her seat in the House of Commons this week following a closely watched by-election win in Gorton and Denton.

secondaryNews.author: Davenport
secondaryNews.title: House Ethics Panel Launches Investigation Into Rep. Nancy Mace
secondaryNews.description: Capitol Hill faces a new inquiry as the House Ethics Committee officially opens an investigation into Representative Nancy Mace.

featured.author: Davenport
featured.title: Puerto Rico Changes Investor Tax Break to a 4% Fixed Rate
featured.quote: Puerto Rico's House Bill 505 changes the tax incentive for resident investors from a zero-tax system to a more stable 4% fixed rate for new applicants starting in 2027.

grid.author: Davenport
grid.title: Polaris Gets the Go-Ahead for a Big Battery Storage Project in Puerto Rico
grid.description: PREPA has agreed to a 71.4MW battery energy storage system deal with Polaris Renewable Energy.

grid.author: Davenport
grid.title: Macron vows to rebuild a 'more beautiful' Notre-Dame in 5 years
grid.description: First up, you need to know that Zara's sales start online at 10 p.m. now, there isn't a sale..
